response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages but lacks the core requirements for this role. There is no recent or substantial C++ work — only a brief stint at National Instruments (Dec 2014 – June 2015) writing C/C++ components, which is over a decade old and falls far short of the 5–10 years required. No Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience listed (only MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL), and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain exposure. Strengths in DLang, Node.js, and TypeScript do not map to the role's mandatory stack.
strengths: Strong overall software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Polyglot experience including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Solid communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience, over 10 years ago — far below the 5–10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows stack
